AddressString.description:
A string that can be parsed into a valid address for a given chain.

 Must be decodable to a valid address for the given chain.
 Ethereum addresses should be encoded as hex.
 Polkadot addresses can be encoded as 32-byte hex or using the ss58 format.
 Bitcoin addresses can be encoded using either bech32 or base58 standards.
 Solana addresses should be encoded using base58.

ccm_additional_data.description: Additional parameters for the cross chain message.

gas_budget.description: User funds designated to be used for gas.

oneOf.description: A number represented a `0x`-prefixed hex-encoded string.

message.description: Call data used after the message is egressed.

min_price.description: The minimum price the user is willing to accept in order to sell their assets.

refund_address.description: Where to send any deposited funds that fail to execute at the desired minimum price.

retry_duration.description:
How long to keep retrying each swap chunk before cancelling and refunding. Measured in
 6-second block numbers.

min_price.description: The minimum price the user is willing to accept in order to sell their assets.

refund_address.description: Where to send any deposited funds that fail to execute at the desired minimum price.

retry_duration.description:
How long to keep retrying each swap chunk before cancelling and refunding. Measured in
 6-second block numbers.

chunk_interval.description: The interval in blocks between each swap.

number_of_chunks.description: The number of individual swaps to be executed

Request_for_AddressString.description: A Request to open a swap deposit channel.

boost_fee.description: Optional Boost fee, measured in basis points.

broker_commission.description: Broker commission to be charged, measured in basis points. Each basis point is 0.01%.

destination_address.description: The address that the swap output should be sent to.

destination_asset.description: The asset that the users wants to receive.

source_asset.description: The asset that the user wants to send.

Request_for_null.description: A Request to open a swap deposit channel.

boost_fee.description: Optional Boost fee, measured in basis points.

broker_commission.description: Broker commission to be charged, measured in basis points. Each basis point is 0.01%.

destination_address.description: The address that the swap output should be sent to.

destination_asset.description: The asset that the users wants to receive.

input_amount.description: The amount of the input asset that the user wishes to swap.

source_asset.description: The asset that the user wants to send.

number_or_hex.description: A number represented as a JSON number or a `0x`-prefixed hex-encoded string.

oneOf.description: A number represented a `0x`-prefixed hex-encoded string.

nulldata_utxo.description: A vector of bytes encoded as a `0x`-prefixed hex string.
